free_text: Tests of the factorized distorted wave impulse
approximation for (p,2p) reactions.
Sector-focused isochronous cyclotron.
Distorted-wave impulse approximation analysis.
No information about source of uncertainty
Detector telescopes in a coplanar
geometry on both sides of the incident beam. Each
telescope consisted of one 540 um thick silicon
surface barrier detector and a high purity germanium
stopping detector.
By CAJAD.
Some corrections in reaction.(Sf5).
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Corrections in all Subents. ERR-S -> E-ERR-DIG.
Subents 002-019 and 020-027 were merged. COMMENT
deleted
A natural calcium target was used.
Figs 3,4 from Phys.Rev.,C34(1986)1610
SD: SF5=PAR added; SF9=EXP deleted from
REACTION code.  Data from Subents 003-019 added. Data
units were updated (MB/SR2/MEV -> MUB/SR2MEV).
Gaseous O-16 in a cylindrical gas cell of diameter
12.7 cm and depth 6.4 cm was used.
Fig. 5 from Phys.Rev.,C34(1986)1610
